'''Quadducks''' were six-[[Limb/Legends|limbed]] [[Bird/Legends|avians]] that could be found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. They were related to the [[Duck/Legends|ducks]] and the [[Pelikki/Legends|pelikki]], two other waterfowl [[Species/Legends|species]] that also lived on Naboo.<ref name="EVD" /> In addition to their wings, they had not two but four legs. Despite being bigger than them, the quadducks were preyed upon by the [[twirrl]]s, a species of flying [[Mammal/Legends|mammalians]].<ref name="WoSW" />
